```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;text-align:center;">

 <div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.95em;flex-wrap:wrap;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.65em;">
  <span style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F4F2FB,#EEEDF8);color:#5654A2;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px solid #5654A2;">A &nbsp;✓ /commit</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#9B8EA0;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px dashed #C4C3E8;">B &nbsp;?</span>
  <span style="color:#9B8EA0;">→</span>
  <span style="background:#FFFFFF;color:#9B8EA0;padding:0.3em 0.7em;border-radius:8px;border:1.5px dashed #C4C3E8;">C &nbsp;?</span>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.8em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);border:1px solid #F2B5A8;opacity:0.8;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.3em;">
    <span style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;border-radius:50%;background:#D45F47;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.55em;font-weight:900;">✕</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#D45F47;font-weight:700;">Copy-paste</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Drifts the moment you improve one.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.8em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border:1px solid #E8C77E;opacity:0.8;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.3em;">
    <span style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;border-radius:50%;background:#C4881A;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.55em;font-weight:900;">⚠</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#C4881A;font-weight:700;">Plugin</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Real solution. Overkill for one or two.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:linear-gradient(135deg,#F4F2FB,#EEEDF8);border-radius:12px;padding:0.8em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.18);border:2px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.4em;margin-bottom:0.3em;">
    <span style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;border-radius:50%;background:#5654A2;color:#F8F7F0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.55em;font-weight:900;">✓</span>
    <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#5654A2;font-weight:700;">Symlink</span>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.4;">Lightweight middle path.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
